00037 
00038 package java.io;
00039 
00051 public abstract class InputStream
00052 {
00056     public InputStream()
00057     {
00058     }
00059 
00071     public int available() throws IOException
00072     {
00073         return 0;
00074     }
00075 
00086     public void close() throws IOException
00087     {
00088         // Do nothing
00089     }
00090 
00108     public void mark(int readLimit)
00109     {
00110         // Do nothing
00111     }
00112 
00126     public boolean markSupported()
00127     {
00128         return false;
00129     }
00130 
00142     public abstract int read() throws IOException;
00143 
00161     public int read(byte[] b) throws IOException
00162     {
00163         return read(b, 0, b.length);
00164     }
00165 
00194     public int read(byte[] b, int off, int len) throws IOException
00195     {
00196         if (off < 0 || len < 0 || off + len > b.length)
00197             throw new IndexOutOfBoundsException();
00198 
00199         if (b.length == 0)
00200             return 0;
00201 
00202         int i, ch;
00203 
00204         for (i = 0; i < len; ++i)
00205             try
00206             {
00207                 if ((ch = read()) < 0)
00208                     return i == 0 ? -1 : i; // EOF
00209 
00210                 b[off + i] = (byte) ch;
00211             }
00212             catch (IOException ex)
00213             {
00214                 // Only reading the first byte should cause an IOException.
00215                 if (i == 0)
00216                     throw ex;
00217 
00218                 return i;
00219             }
00220 
00221         return i;
00222     }
00223 
00235     public void reset() throws IOException
00236     {
00237         throw new IOException("mark/reset not supported");
00238     }
00239 
00257     public long skip(long n) throws IOException
00258     {
00259         // Throw away n bytes by reading them into a temp byte[].
00260         // Limit the temp array to 2Kb so we don't grab too much memory.
00261 
00262         final int buflen = n > 2048 ? 2048 : (int) n;
00263 
00264         byte[] tmpbuf = new byte[buflen];
00265 
00266         final long origN = n;
00267 
00268         while (n > 0L)
00269         {
00270             int numread = read(tmpbuf, 0, n > buflen ? buflen : (int) n);
00271 
00272             if (numread <= 0)
00273                 break;
00274 
00275             n -= numread;
00276         }
00277 
00278         return origN - n;
00279     }
00280 }
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:23 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
